meaning: adj.空气的,空中的,通风的,轻快的,空想的
examples: The office was light and airy.
The whole effect is cool, light, and airy.
The room lends itself well to summer eating with its light, airy atmosphere.
Triyoga Chelsea, on the other hand, is a beautiful, clean and airy space opened by lawyer-turned-yogi Jonathan Sattin.
An airy living room overlooks the pool and outdoor entertaining area that features a cabana.
